sentence: 上海港是全球重要的航运中心。
pinyin: Shànghǎi gǎng shì quánqiú zhòngyào de hángyùn zhōngxīn.
english: Shanghai Port is an important global shipping hub.

sentence: 他赶上了最后一班班机回家。
pinyin: Tā gǎn shàng le zuìhòu yī bān bānjī huíjiā.
english: He caught the last flight home.

meaning: 1. dealer; 2. trader; 3. person engaged in some industry or trade
sentence: 当地业者联合起来反对新的收费政策。
pinyin: Dāngdì yèzhě liánhé qǐlái fǎnduì xīn de shōufèi zhèngcè.
english: Local traders joined together to oppose the new fee policy.

sentence: 香港基本法规定了特区的基本制度。
pinyin: Xiānggǎng jīběnfǎ guīdìng le tèqū de jīběn zhìdù.
english: The Hong Kong Basic Law stipulates the fundamental systems of the Special Administrative Region.

sentence: 这款免费软件可以帮你把PDF转成Word。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn miǎnfèi ruǎnjiàn kěyǐ bāng nǐ bǎ PDF zhuǎn chéng Word.
english: This freeware can help you convert PDFs into Word documents.
